季宁穿越修仙界，睁眼就是全族被灭、孤身一人。
他隐姓埋名，苟在小山村当农户，却意外觉醒【家族修仙系统】，能从蓝星召唤玩家。
从此，画风突变：
“家主，灵田已开垦万亩，灵石矿脉挖穿三层！”
“家主，护山大阵已升级至99层，反伤带毒带幻阵！”
“家主，隔壁宗门圣女说她自愿联姻，陪嫁灵脉三条！”
季宁背着手，看着玩家疯狂搞基建、抢地盘、吞并周边家族，默默点头：
“很好，但记住，我们季家，一向热爱和平，以德服人。”
直到某日，正魔两道联手围剿季家，声势震天。
正道魁首立于云端，声如洪钟：“季家修炼邪术，操控人心，当诛！”
魔道巨擘脚踏血海，狞笑附和：“此族之气运，合该为我等血祭！”
季宁叹了口气，轻轻打了一个响指。
下一秒——
正道首席大师兄撕掉道袍，振臂高呼：“报告家主！季家季霸天申请归族！”
手持【人皇幡】的幽冥老祖撕开虚空：“桀桀桀，本座卧底多年，就等今日！”
某圣地天骄躬身：“师尊，其实我姓季。”
正魔两道集体崩溃：“等等……你们怎么全是季家的人？!”
季宁袖袍一挥，在无数玩家眼中，敌人齐齐亮出血条：
“现在，谁才是反派？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob10219d9316a4149e2d90ff073edfcf2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"高图","author_id":"","book_id":"7527927357710027800","book_name":"第四天灾：我的族人都是玩家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1074人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534598900246643225","read_count":"1074","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"126254"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,第四天灾,系统,穿越,基建,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob10219d9316a4149e2d90ff073edfcf2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393952&x-signature=RH1u2oF52%2FdySGv4kg72E6WaoJ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2329189601255283","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_i
